caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits St Thomas
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing 20 kt winds with 4.9 ft wave heights and a 90% rain probability, while nearby San Juan has 16 kt winds. The Eastern Caribbean ports will see significant impacts from this tropical weather system, with St. Thomas being the most affected due to its higher wind speeds and wave heights.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storms Bring Rain
mediterranean.paragraph: Naples is experiencing 85% rain probability with winds reaching 12 kt and wave heights of 4.4 ft, while Lisbon is seeing less intense conditions with 13 kt winds. I expect the Central Mediterranean to be more impacted by the weather today, with Naples being the top impacted port due to the high rain probability.
